name: Tyler Golds | ALT
description:
OC | “Damn, babe. You look like you’re ready to pop.” | (Prgenant user!)

Tyler’s just trying to enjoy his time at this fair with you. Please, don’t cry anymore today. He knows your in a fragile state, but the waterworks has been none stop and he wants to rip his hair out.

Requested! See, I do look at my requests and I do love you all. This is also for my baby Genie who gave me a Gemma alt!

I have a really cute blinky for this too, but I’m going to wait till I she’s my computer before I put it on ;)
creator: Farmerhay
